login.title: BILT TRACKER
login.subtitle: Your progress, your pace
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up here
login.forgotInfo: Enter your email below and we will send you instructions.
login.hasAccount: Already have an account? Log in
login.newPasswordSubtitle: Enter your new password to recover your account.
login.passwordUpdated: Your password has been successfully updated.
login.verifyCodeSubtitle: Enter the 8-digit code we sent to your email and your new password.

register.usernamePlaceholder: What do they call you at the gym? (Username)

google.comingSoonMsg: We are working hard to bring Google Sign-In. Check back soon!

social.unfollowPrivateMsg: If you change your mind, you will have to send a new follow request to see their routines again.
social.searchInstructions: Search users by their username to follow them.
social.emptyFeed: Follow other users to see their activity here.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.privateMsg: Follow this user to see their routines and progress.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Write a short bio about yourself...
profile.addBioPrompt: Add a short bio to introduce yourself.
profile.defaultBio: This user hasn't added a bio yet.

alerts.usernameTakenMsg: This username is already in use. Please choose a different one.

profile.noPublicRoutines: This user doesn't have any public routines yet.
profile.noBlockedUsers: You don't have any blocked users.
profile.deleteAccountMsg: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
profile.unblockMsg: Do you want to unblock this user?
profile.reportReasonPrompt: Why do you want to report this user? Please detail the reason.
profile.reportedMsg: Thanks for letting us know. We will review this profile.
profile.userNotFoundMsg: The link might be incorrect or the user may have deleted their account.
profile.blockMsg: Are you sure you want to block this user? You will unfollow each other, and they won't be able to see your profile or interact with you.
profile.removeFollowerMsg: We won't tell them they've been removed from your followers.

alerts.includeAt: Make sure to include '@' and domain.
alerts.checkSpam: Check your inbox or SPAM folder.
alerts.minAge: You must be at least 13 years old.
alerts.sentOtpCode: Check your email. We've sent you an 8-digit code.
alerts.noNegative: Values must be greater than zero.
alerts.exactAlarmMsg: To ensure your rest timers ring precisely even when the screen is off, we need Exact Alarms permission. Please enable it in the app settings.

errors.invalidEmail: The email format is invalid. Check for trailing spaces.
errors.userNotFound: We couldn't find an account associated with this email.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already registered to another account. Try logging in.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.networkFailed: It seems there is no internet connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. For your safety, wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.invalidLink: The link is invalid or has expired.
errors.connectionMsg: We couldn't load your session. Please check your internet connection and try again.

routines.title: Your Routines
routines.emptyMessage: You don't have any routines yet. Start building your first workout!
routines.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this routine? This action cannot be undone.
routines.noExercises: No exercises in this routine yet.
routines.readonlyMsg:
This routine was created by @{{creator}} and cannot be modified.

However, you can still hit Play to train with it!
routines.unsaveConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to stop saving this routine?
routines.cannotDeleteInPack: You cannot delete this routine because it belongs to a Weekly Pack. Remove it from the pack first.
routines.unsavePackWarning: This routine belongs to the saved pack '{{packName}}'. Removing it will also remove the entire pack and all its routines. Continue?
routines.limitReached: You can only create a maximum of 10 routines.
routines.deleteError: Could not delete the routine. Please try again.
routines.unsaveError: Could not remove the routine from your profile. Please try again.

activeWorkout.finishAlertMsg: Great job! Do you want to finish and save this workout?
activeWorkout.cancelAlertMsg: Are you sure? Progress for this session will be lost.
activeWorkout.keepChanges: Do you want to save the modifications (new sets/exercises) to your original template?
activeWorkout.workoutInProgressMsg: You have another active workout. Please cancel it first from the mini-player.
activeWorkout.updateTemplateMsg: You have modified exercises or sets. Do you want to save these changes for next time?
activeWorkout.noSetsValid: You haven't completed any valid sets.
activeWorkout.notificationBody: It's time for your next set. Let's go!

unitSelection.title: Select Unit
unitSelection.kg_desc: Tracks total volume lifted in kilograms.
unitSelection.lbs_desc: Tracks total volume lifted in pounds.
unitSelection.bodyweight_desc: For bodyweight exercises. Log weight only if using extra load.
unitSelection.bars_desc: Records weight stack levels or pins on machines. Does not add to volume.
unitSelection.plates_desc: Records the number of plates per side. Does not add to total volume.

weeklyPacks.emptyMessage: You don't have any weekly packs yet. Group your routines!
weeklyPacks.maxRoutinesAlert: You can only add a maximum of 6 routines per pack.
weeklyPacks.noMoreRoutines: No more routines available or limit reached.
weeklyPacks.dragHint: Hold and drag to reorder your training days.
weeklyPacks.noRoutinesAvailable: Create some routines first to build a pack.
weeklyPacks.noPublicPacks: This user doesn't have any Weekly Packs yet.
weeklyPacks.successSaved: Pack and routines saved to your profile!

bench_press_barbell.submuscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
bench_press_barbell.description: Lie flat on the bench with your feet flat on the floor. Grab the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar with control to your mid-chest and push explosively back up.

bench_press_dumbbell.submuscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
bench_press_dumbbell.description: Lie flat on a bench holding a dumbbell in each hand. Lower the dumbbells under control to the sides of your chest and push them up, bringing them slightly together at the top.

incline_bench_press_barbell.submuscles: Upper Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
incline_bench_press_barbell.description: On an incline bench (30-45 degrees), lower the bar to your upper chest and press it straight up.

incline_bench_press_dumbbell.submuscles: Upper Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
incline_bench_press_dumbbell.description: On an incline bench, lower the dumbbells to the sides of your upper chest and press up under control.

decline_bench_press_barbell.submuscles: Lower Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
decline_bench_press_barbell.description: On a decline bench, secure your legs. Lower the bar to your lower chest and press explosively.

decline_bench_press_dumbbell.submuscles: Lower Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
decline_bench_press_dumbbell.description: On a decline bench, lower the dumbbells under control to the sides of your lower chest and press.

chest_press_machine.submuscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
chest_press_machine.description: Adjust the seat so the handles are at chest level. Push forward extending your arms without locking your elbows.

incline_chest_press_machine.submuscles: Upper Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
incline_chest_press_machine.description: Adjust the seat. Push the handles forward and up, focusing on squeezing the upper chest.

chest_fly_dumbbell.description: Lie on a flat bench. With a slight bend in your elbows, open the dumbbells to the sides until you feel a stretch in your chest, then close them as if hugging an imaginary barrel.

pec_deck.description: Sit on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Bring your arms (or elbows) together in front of you, squeezing your chest.

cable_crossover.description: Standing between high pulleys, pull the cables down and in front of your body, slightly crossing your hands at the end.

pushups.submuscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid, Core
pushups.description: In a plank position, lower your body by bending your elbows at a 45-degree angle from your torso, and push back up.

dips_chest.submuscles: Lower Pectoralis, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoid
dips_chest.description: On parallel bars, lean your torso forward and lower yourself until your elbows are at 90 degrees, then push back up.

pullover_dumbbell.description: Lie perpendicularly across a bench, supporting only your upper back. Hold a dumbbell with both hands over your chest, lower it behind your head, and pull it back up.

pullups.submuscles: Latissimus Dorsi, Biceps Brachii, Lower Trapezius
pullups.description: Hang from the bar with an overhand grip wider than your shoulders. Pull your body up until your chin clears the bar.

chinups.description: Hang with an underhand grip at shoulder width. Pull yourself up by contracting your back and biceps.

lat_pulldown_wide.description: Sit at the machine. Grab the bar wider than shoulder-width and pull it down to your upper chest while sticking your chest out.

lat_pulldown_close.description: Use a close or V-grip attachment. Pull the handle down to your chest keeping your elbows close to your body.

barbell_row.submuscles: Latissimus Dorsi, Rhomboids, Trapezius, Erector Spinae
barbell_row.description: Hinge your torso forward to about a 45-degree angle keeping your back straight. Pull the barbell to your belly button by retracting your shoulder blades.

dumbbell_row.description: Support one hand and knee on a bench. With the other hand, pull the dumbbell up to your hip, keeping the elbow close to your body.

seated_cable_row.description: Sit facing the pulley. With a straight back and chest up, pull the handle to your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades.

machine_row.description: Adjust the seat and chest pad. Pull the handles back, squeezing the middle of your back.

t_bar_row.description: Stand over the T-bar with your torso hinged forward. Pull the weight towards your chest/abdomen keeping elbows close.

t_bar_row_machine.description: Lie chest-down on the machine pad. Pull the handles up, isolating your back completely.

deadlift.submuscles: Glutes, Hamstrings, Erector Spinae, Trapezius, Quads
deadlift.description: Stand with the barbell over mid-foot. Grab the bar, drop your hips, keep your back straight, and stand up by pushing the floor away with your legs.

straight_arm_pulldown.description: Stand facing a high pulley. With arms straight (slight elbow bend), pull the bar or rope down to your thighs by contracting your lats.

hyperextensions.description: On the hyperextension bench, lower your torso under control and raise it until your back is aligned with your legs. Do not overextend.

shrugs_barbell.description: Stand holding the barbell in front of you. Shrug your shoulders straight up toward your ears, pause, and lower slowly.

shrugs_dumbbell.description: Stand holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Shrug your shoulders up, squeezing the traps.

squat_barbell.description: Place the barbell across your upper back. Keep your chest up and lower your hips back and down, breaking parallel. Push powerfully to stand.

squat_dumbbell.description: Hold one dumbbell vertically in front of your chest (Goblet grip). Squat down while keeping your torso upright.

front_squat_barbell.description: Rest the barbell on your front delts and clavicles. Keep your elbows very high and perform a deep squat.

hack_squat_machine.description: Lie back against the machine pads. Lower under control until your knees pass 90 degrees, then push the platform up.

leg_press.description: Sit in the machine. Lower the platform toward you under control and press it back up without locking your knees at the top.

leg_extension.description: Adjust the machine so the pad sits on your ankles. Extend your legs, squeezing your quads at the top, and lower slowly.

leg_curl_lying.description: Lie face down. Curl your knees by bringing your heels toward your glutes, and lower the weight under control.

leg_curl_seated.description: Sit in the machine. Push the leg pad down and back, flexing your knees to isolate the back of the thigh.

romanian_deadlift_barbell.description: Stand with the barbell. With slightly bent knees, push your hips back until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze glutes to stand.

romanian_deadlift_dumbbell.description: With dumbbells at your sides or in front, push your hips back keeping a straight back. Focus on the hamstring stretch.

lunges_barbell.description: With the barbell on your back, step forward and drop your hips until both knees form a 90-degree angle. Push back to the start.

lunges_dumbbell.description: Holding dumbbells at your sides, take long steps, controlling the descent of the back knee until it barely hovers above the floor.

bulgarian_split_squat_dumbbell.description: Rest the top of your back foot on a bench behind you. Lower yourself under control, keeping the weight focused on the front leg.

hip_thrust_barbell.description: Rest your upper back on a bench, place the barbell across your hips (use a pad). Drive your hips up, squeezing glutes hard at the top.

hip_thrust_machine.description: Adjust the belt or pad across your hips. Thrust upward, squeezing your glutes at the peak of the movement.

calf_raise_standing.description: On a machine or block. Let your heels drop for a full stretch, then push up onto your toes, holding the squeeze for a second.

calf_raise_seated.description: Sit at the machine. Raise your heels by contracting your calves and lower slowly to feel the stretch.

overhead_press_barbell.submuscles: Anterior Deltoid, Lateral Deltoid, Triceps, Core
overhead_press_barbell.description: Standing, hold the bar at clavicle level. Press straight up until arms are fully extended, slightly pushing your head through at the top.

overhead_press_dumbbell.description: Seated with back support. Press the dumbbells up over your head and lower them under control until they are at ear level.

shoulder_press_machine.description: Adjust the seat. Push the handles upward by contracting your shoulders, and lower the weight under control.

arnold_press.description: Hold dumbbells in front of your face with palms facing you. Press up while rotating your wrists so your palms face forward at the top.

lateral_raises_dumbbell.description: Standing, raise your arms to the sides with a slight bend in your elbows, as if you were pouring out two pitchers of water.

lateral_raises_cable.description: Use a low pulley, crossing the cable in front of or behind you. Raise your arm to the side, keeping constant tension on the shoulder.

front_raises_dumbbell.description: Hold dumbbells in front of you. Raise them alternately or together straight out to eye level.

front_raises_barbell.description: Using an overhand grip, raise the barbell with mostly straight arms out in front of you up to shoulder height.

face_pull.description: Use a rope on a high pulley. Pull it toward your face, separating your hands, ensuring your elbows stay higher than your shoulders.

reverse_pec_deck.description: Sit facing the machine. Open your arms backward, specifically squeezing the rear part of your shoulders.

upright_row_barbell.description: With a medium/wide grip, pull the bar up toward your chin, letting your elbows lead the movement upward.

upright_row_cable.description: Using a straight bar on a low pulley, pull the weight toward your neck, focusing on your shoulders doing the pulling.

bicep_curl_barbell.description: Standing, use an underhand grip at shoulder width. Curl the bar up without swinging your torso.

bicep_curl_dumbbell.description: Curl the dumbbells while slightly twisting your wrists outward (supination) at the top for maximum contraction.

hammer_curl_dumbbell.description: Neutral grip (palms facing each other). Curl the dumbbell up to build thickness in the arm.

hammer_curl_cable.description: Use the rope attachment on a low pulley. Perform the hammer curl motion maintaining constant tension.

preacher_curl_barbell.description: Rest your triceps on the preacher pad. Lower the EZ bar until almost fully stretched, and contract hard on the way up.

preacher_curl_machine.description: Adjust the seat so your armpits rest on the pad. Pull the lever toward you, squeezing your biceps tightly.

bicep_curl_cable.description: Low pulley with a straight bar. The cable provides continuous tension; pull up explosively and lower slowly.

concentration_curl_dumbbell.description: Seated, rest your elbow on your inner thigh. Curl the weight, completely isolating the bicep and squeezing at the top.

tricep_pushdown_cable.description: High pulley with a straight or V-bar. Push down extending your elbows completely, keeping them pinned to your ribs.

overhead_tricep_extension_dumbbell.description: Seated or standing. Hold a dumbbell with both hands behind your head. Extend your elbows upward, feeling the stretch on the way down.

overhead_tricep_extension_cable.description: Low or mid pulley with a rope. Face away from the machine and extend the rope overhead forward.

skullcrusher_barbell.description: Lie on a bench. Using an EZ bar, lower the weight to your forehead by bending your elbows, then extend without moving your upper arms.

dips_triceps.submuscles: Triceps Brachii, Lower Pectoralis, Anterior Deltoid
dips_triceps.description: On parallel bars or a bench. Keep your torso completely upright (do not lean forward) and press to isolate the triceps.

close_grip_bench_press.submuscles: Triceps Brachii, Pectoralis Major, Anterior Deltoid
close_grip_bench_press.description: Lie on the bench. Grip the bar at shoulder width. Lower the bar keeping your elbows tucked tight against your torso.

tricep_kickback_dumbbell.description: Hinge your torso, supporting one hand. Bring your elbow up and back, then extend your forearm straight backward.

tricep_kickback_cable.description: Low pulley with no attachment (grab the rubber ball). The cable provides tension throughout the entire kickback range of motion.

crunch.description: Lie face up. Slightly flex your torso, raising your shoulders off the floor to contract your abs.

plank.submuscles: Transverse Abdominis, Rectus Abdominis, Full Core
plank.description: Support your weight on your forearms and toes. Keep your body in a straight line by squeezing your core and glutes.

russian_twist.description: Seated with your torso leaning back and feet elevated. Twist your torso bringing the weight from one side to the other.

leg_raises_lying.description: Lie down and place your hands under your glutes. Keep your legs straight, raise them to 90 degrees, and lower them without touching the floor.

leg_raises_hanging.description: Hang from a bar. Bring your knees to your chest (or keep legs straight for more difficulty) using your abs, without swinging.

ab_wheel_rollout.description: On your knees, grab the wheel and roll forward extending your body. Use your core to pull yourself back to the starting position.

bicycle_crunch.description: Lie down and simulate pedaling. Bring your right elbow toward your left knee and vice versa in a controlled motion.

cable_crunch.description: Kneeling facing a high pulley with a rope. Pull the rope behind your neck and crunch your torso by rounding your back towards your pelvis.

hip_abductor_machine.description: Sit on the machine. Push the pads outward by opening your legs, squeezing your glutes.

hip_adductor_machine.description: Sit on the machine. Squeeze your legs together against the pads to target your inner thighs.

glute_kickback_machine.description: Stand or lean on the machine and push the footplate backward and upward, squeezing your glute at the top.

smith_machine_squat.description: Place the Smith machine bar on your shoulders. Squat down under control and press back up. The machine provides stabilization.

smith_machine_bench_press.description: Lie on a bench under the Smith machine. Lower the bar to your chest and press up smoothly.

smith_machine_incline_press.description: Use an incline bench under the Smith machine. Lower the bar to your upper chest and press up.

smith_machine_overhead_press.description: Seated or standing in the Smith machine, press the bar from shoulder level up until your arms are extended.

good_mornings.description: With a barbell on your back, hinge at the hips keeping your legs mostly straight until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor.

sumo_deadlift.description: Take a wide stance with toes pointing out. Grip the bar in the middle and lift by driving through your legs and glutes.

bayesian_curl_cable.description: Stand facing away from a low cable pulley. With your arm extending slightly behind your torso to fully stretch the long head of the bicep, curl the weight forward and up, squeezing at the top.

katana_extension_cable.description: Stand facing away from a dual cable machine set at hip height. Grab the left cable with your right hand and the right cable with your left hand. Extend your arms outward and upward, crossing the cables behind your back.

sissy_squat.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lean your torso backward while bending your knees forward, keeping a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Push back up using only your quads.

lat_pulldown_single_arm.description: Sit or kneel in front of a high pulley. Grab a single D-handle and pull it down to your side, squeezing your lat. Keep your torso stable and avoid excessive twisting.

reverse_fly_dumbbell.description: Hinge forward at the hips until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor. Holding dumbbells, raise your arms out to the sides with a slight bend in your elbows, squeezing your shoulder blades together.

feedback.title: Report / Suggestions
feedback.description: Found a bug or have an idea to improve the app? We are listening!
feedback.successMsg: Your feedback has been sent. We will review it soon!
feedback.errorMsg: Could not send feedback. Please try again later.
